summary: Subscription Renewal Bug Fix - All 35 tests pass. Debug endpoint correctly calculates remaining days from subscription_expiry/vip_expiry fields. Total days formula (plan_duration + remaining_days) verified for all plan types (monthly, quarterly, half_yearly, yearly). Test user has 373 remaining days and renewal would correctly give 401 total days (28 + 373).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription renewal bug fix verified. The debug endpoint at GET /api/razorpay/debug/subscription-renewal/{user_id} correctly shows remaining days calculation. All code paths (verify-payment, webhook, manual_sync, auto_sync) now check subscription_expires OR subscription_expiry OR vip_expiry fields. Formula: total_days = plan_duration + remaining_days is working correctly.
features_tested: GET /api/razorpay/debug/subscription-renewal/{user_id} - Returns user info and remaining days
Debug endpoint shows raw_fields (subscription_expires, subscription_expiry, vip_expiry)
Remaining days calculated correctly from subscription_expiry string field
Remaining days calculated correctly from vip_expiry field
Total days = plan_duration + remaining_days for monthly (28 days)
Total days = plan_duration + remaining_days for quarterly (84 days)
Total days = plan_duration + remaining_days for half_yearly (168 days)
Total days = plan_duration + remaining_days for yearly (336 days)
Debug endpoint returns 404 for non-existent user
Existing razorpay payment tests still pass

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: Remaining days not being added when user renews subscription
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Webhook and sync code only checked subscription_expires field, but database had subscription_expiry (string) and vip_expiry
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: All code paths now check: subscription_expires OR subscription_expiry OR vip_expiry
bug_fix_verification.verification: Debug endpoint shows test user with 373 remaining days would get 401 total days on monthly renewal (28 + 373)
